title: DashBuddy rules FRAGMENT (surface sub-file)
description: Editor schema for a partial per-surface rule sub-file under matchers/rules/<platform>/ (e.g. doordash/pickup.json5). A fragment carries ONLY a slice of screens/clicks/notifications; the platform metadata (format_version, platform_id) lives in _manifest.json5, and the canonicalizer MERGES every sub-file into one canonical assets/rules/<platform>.json that validates against the full rules.schema.json. This fragment schema therefore drops the top-level `required` (format_version/platform_id) so a partial file shows no false 'missing key' error, while still validating each individual rule against the SAME $defs the full schema uses (no duplication).
